label: Basis Trade Workbench
description: Form widget computing basis-trade (spot vs perp) expected output, margin usage, funding impact, cost-of-carry, net APY, breakeven and a local trade history. NOT REGISTERED in components/widgets/defi/register.ts and no longer rendered anywhere in the app as of 2026-04-21.

l0.notes: Audit skipped — widget is dead code (not in register.ts and no external imports). Certifying would give false coverage.

relationships.notes: Functionality supplanted by enhanced-basis-widget + defi-swap-widget (with isBasisTrade/isStakedBasis modes).

dataContract.notes: Inputs come through defi-data-context but widget is never instantiated.

knownIssues: Dead code — not registered in defi register.ts.

findings.description: components/widgets/defi/defi-basis-trade-widget.tsx is never imported outside its own file. register.ts does not register defi-basis-trade, and a full-repo grep for DeFiBasisTradeWidget finds only the export itself.
findings.proposedFix: Either (a) delete the file, or (b) register it behind a feature flag if a workbench UI is still desired. Dead code in the registry-less path still type-checks and bloats the bundle via tree-shaking hazards from useDeFiData. Keeping two basis-trade UIs (this + enhanced-basis) also confuses future editors.
